rationale: Phase 4.8 runs after Phase 3 sums the score and only patches a risk phrase post-hoc without correcting Criterion D; extending Pattern B detection at Phase 2 (this issue's Step 1) fixes the score at the source, making the flag redundant. Wiring the flag into scoring instead would keep two independent classification passes that could disagree.
rule: Retire mechanical_fanout_suppressed; fold Phase 4.8 detection into extended Pattern B classification
alternatives_rejected: Wire mechanical_fanout_suppressed into Criterion D scoring as a post-hoc override
